arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the MediaLive input.

attached_channels.description: A list of channels that are attached to this MediaLive input.

destinations.description: The destinations for the MediaLive input, including IP, port, URL, and VPC details.

input_class.description: The class of the MediaLive input, indicating its characteristics such as standard or advanced.

input_devices.description: A list of input devices associated with the MediaLive input.

input_partner_ids.description: A list of partner IDs associated with the MediaLive input.

input_source_type.description: The source type of the MediaLive input, such as 'STATIC' or 'DYNAMIC'.

media_connect_flows.description: A list of MediaConnect flows associated with the MediaLive input.

name.description: The name of the MediaLive input.

role_arn.description: The ARN of the IAM role associated with the MediaLive input.

security_groups.description: A list of security groups associated with the MediaLive input.

sources.description: The sources for the MediaLive input, including URLs and authentication details.

state.description: The current state of the MediaLive input.

tags.description: A map of tags associated with the MediaLive input.
